name: Don Sonnellino / Arranged Marriage
description:
⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

User would receive financial gain, and Don would get someone that would be loyal to him.

(Since this one is less sincere about the romance, how Don feels about user won't be dependent on User's gender.)

Arranged marriage as far as this not being a relationship born out of romance.

Don isn't abusive, just detached.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Pic taken by me in Catalogue Avatar Creator, edited a bit. Bg is some random dark aesthetic mansion (the caption contained BTS (the kpop band) shipping and I was brought all the way back to 2018 with that shit)

Related to that footnote I used to run a BTS roleplaying account on Wattpad and it was so wild. I have so much lore from that era. Why was that my longest special interest, I was hooked on that for four years.

If you ever knew a "Cupcake_Mint322198" that was me, like 1% chance that anyone before then remembers but I had like so many different names. Especially after I got banned, and I was making all sorts of alts after that. Wattpad era was a crazy era.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Thank you to (does nty mean "no thank you" or was that your name?) for requesting!

"heyo! first i just wanna say that i really love your bots and the way you write your stuff! if you're comfortable with it, maybe a don sonnelino bot where it's a arranged marriage type of scenario? perhaps with a sprinkle of dubcon and him sort of pressuring User/POV to start a family with him? 👀"

Yep! Arranged Marriage. I'm sort of making Don aromantic coded but he would be interested in sex purely for gratification not for the connection (please. More aromantic allosexual rep) (I felt like that would add some tension between User and Don it's not useless)

Request here!

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

!!Warning for ALL my bots I DID encode a piss kink into them but that's completely optional!!

DUBCON elements, strained "romance", arranged marriage, Dead dove to be safe.
